content: Entender el problema antes de elegir la solucion.
title: Problem first

content: Preferir contratos y source of truth a intuiciones dispersas.
title: Contracts over intuition

content: Todo modulo importante necesita fallback o salida segura.
title: Fallback required

content: Si TASK_BOARD, CURRENT_FOCUS o AGENT_LOG se contradicen, verificar el codigo real antes de asumir que una tarea esta completa o pendiente.
title: Verify board drift against code

content: Cada agente debe tener su propia session de memoria. No compartir estado mutable entre agentes sin un mediator.
title: Memory isolation per agent

content: En componentes que reciben props complejas, usar React.memo() y useCallback() para handlers. Esto previene re-renders innecesarios.
title: UseMemo and useCallback by default

content: Implementar rate limiting diferenciado por tier de usuario (FREE/PRO/ELITE). Convex tiene tabla rateLimits ya definida.
title: Rate limiting at tier boundaries

content: Al migrar knowledge bases de un schema a otro, siempre mapear campos equivalentes (statement->content, title->content) y mantener backward compatibility.
title: Knowledge base schema migration

content: En tests que usan localStorage, siempre limpiar en beforeEach. Usar vi.clearAllMocks() para mocks persistentes.
title: Test isolation with localStorage

content: Tests E2E para auth flows requieren mocking de Convex o servicios externos. Tests unit puros no necesitan infraestructura.
title: E2E tests need mocks for external services

content: Todo trabajo empieza con task reclamada, focus declarado y cierre en log.
title: Task + focus + log

content: Toda integracion compleja arranca con dossier, riesgos y fallback.
title: Integration dossier

content: En juegos y productos complejos, validar primero una version recortada y operable.
title: Vertical slice first

content: Componentes grandes con handlers deben usar memo() + useCallback() para evitar re-renders innecesarios.
title: React.memo with useCallback

content: Rate limiting diferenciado por tier (FREE/PRO/ELITE) con tabla rateLimits en Convex.
title: Tier-based rate limiting

content: Knowledge entries usan schema unificado: id, content, domain, confidence, trustScore, freshness, validatedBy, reuseCount.
title: Knowledge schema normalization

content: Tests con async/retry usan vi.useFakeTimers() + vi.runAllTimersAsync() para control deterministic.
title: Fake timers for async tests

content: {"id":"rule_1774253019443_ccu4","trigger":"leaderboard|xp|gamification","action":"gamification","pattern":"Gamification needs XP system + levels + rewards + progress visualization","type":"pattern_rule","timestamp":1774253019443}
pattern: Gamification needs XP system + levels + rewards + progress visualization

content: No empezar sin entender el pedido, restricciones y salida esperada.
title: Start without intent

content: No trabajar sin task reclamada y focus declarado.
title: No task claim

content: No construir modulos o syncs sin definir source of truth.
title: No source of truth

content: No entregar modulos importantes sin fallback o salida segura.
title: No fallback

content: No confiar en el cliente para permisos, pagos o acciones criticas.
title: Trusting client

content: No guardar teoria ornamental o duplicados en la base de conocimiento.
title: Noise in memory

content: No optimizar por metricas vacias sacrificando confianza o utilidad.
title: Vanity-first growth

content: Promises rechazadas en tests sin handler inmediato causan errores en vitest con fake timers.
title: Unhandled promise rejection

content: Knowledge entries con campos inconsistentes (statement vs content, title vs content) rompen validacion.
title: Content field mismatch

content: Handlers definidos inline causan re-renders innecesarios en componentes con props complejas.
title: React unnecessary re-renders

content: {"id":"RESEARCH-AuraHQ-ai-aura-2026-03-23","title":"Research AuraHQ-ai/aura","statement":"Aura is an AI team member with persistent memory using PostgreSQL + pgvector. After every exchange, a fast LLM extracts structured memories (facts, decisions, relationships, open threads) that are embedded and stored. Top ~10 most similar memories retrieved for context. Memory decay at 0.5%/day with floor at 0.01. Consolidation runs daily to merge duplicates via cosine similarity threshold (95%). This is the production-ready pattern for Aurora local memory.","tags":["research","aurora","memory","postgres","pgvector"],"source":"github.com/AuraHQ-ai/aura","sourceType":"oss_repo","taskId":"OSS-RESEARCH","domain":"aurora_ops","confidence":0.85,"reuseScore":0.9,"validated":true,"createdAt":"2026-03-23T18:45:00.000Z"}
title: Research AuraHQ-ai/aura
statement: Aura is an AI team member with persistent memory using PostgreSQL + pgvector. After every exchange, a fast LLM extracts structured memories (facts, decisions, relationships, open threads) that are embedded and stored. Top ~10 most similar memories retrieved for context. Memory decay at 0.5%/day with floor at 0.01. Consolidation runs daily to merge duplicates via cosine similarity threshold (95%). This is the production-ready pattern for Aurora local memory.

content: {"name":"code-graph-mcp","type":"code-analysis/knowledge-graph","url":"https://github.com/sdsrss/code-graph-mcp","stars":0,"updated":"2026-03-24","description":"MCP server que indexa codebase en AST knowledge graph. Reduce 40-60% tokens usando 9 herramientas: project_map (arquitectura), semantic_code_search (BM25+vector), trace_call_chain, find_dependents. 10 lenguajes: TS, JS, Go, Python, Rust, Java, C, C++, HTML, CSS. Incremental indexing con BLAKE3 Merkle tree.","use_case":"Token optimization para Claude Code. Reemplaza 5-20 grep+read calls con 1 call. Essential para Aurora entender codebase sin quemAR tokens.","mcp":true,"benchmarks":{"tool_calls":"-80%","source_code":"-95%","tokens":"-40-60%"},"languages":["TypeScript","JavaScript","Go","Python","Rust","Java","C","C++","HTML","CSS"],"tools":["project_map","semantic_code_search","trace_call_chain","find_dependents","find_definitions","get_symbols","analyze_impact","find_tests","list_exports"]}
name: code-graph-mcp
description: MCP server que indexa codebase en AST knowledge graph. Reduce 40-60% tokens usando 9 herramientas: project_map (arquitectura), semantic_code_search (BM25+vector), trace_call_chain, find_dependents. 10 lenguajes: TS, JS, Go, Python, Rust, Java, C, C++, HTML, CSS. Incremental indexing con BLAKE3 Merkle tree.
